title: Flow Matching for Generative Modeling

adversarial_note: Language-model setting, not continuous trajectory world models.

title: Regularized Best-of-N Sampling to Mitigate Reward Hacking for Language Model Alignment
authors: Yuu Jinnai; et al.
relevance_to_project: Shows that regularizing Best-of-N can reduce proxy exploitation.
adversarial_note: Our repair must be framed as an adaptation, not a new general principle.

title: World Models
authors: David Ha; Juergen Schmidhuber

adversarial_note: Autoregressive latent dynamics differ from flow-generated trajectory models.

title: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
authors: Danijar Hafner; Timothy Lillicrap; Ian Fischer; et al.

authors: Danijar Hafner; Timothy Lillicrap; Jimmy Ba; Mohammad Norouzi
